<!-- A short description of what changed and why. -->

## Related issue

<!-- Closes #123, or "N/A" for small fixes. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (new command, new config option)
- [ ] New target adapter
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run build && npm test` locally and everything passes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests covering this change.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` (under "Unreleased") if this is user-visible.
- [ ] I updated relevant docs (`README.md`, `README.ja.md`, `docs/`, `ARCHITECTURE.md`) if behavior or the adapter list changed.
- [ ] For a new adapter: I added it to `src/adapters/index.ts`, the README's "Supported targets" table, and `tests/unit/adapters.test.ts`.
